name: BytesURL
description: A scalable URL shortener platform that allows users to generate and manage short links with real-time analytics. Includes secure authentication, role-based access control, subscription management with payments, and AI-powered chat assistance.
highlights: Scalable architecture capable of generating 281 trillion+ unique links via NanoID
Role-based access control for users and admins
AI chat integration for link management

name: GreenStatesBD
description: A scalable real estate platform that enables users to explore, list, and interact with properties through a bidding-based system. Includes role-based access control, content moderation, AI-powered features, and optimized media handling for a production-ready experience.
highlights: Role-based access control (User, Admin, Moderator, Manager)
AI-powered blog generation for property listings
Integrated AI assistant and report/moderation system

name: FoodHub
description: A full-stack food ordering platform that enables users to browse meals, place orders, and manage food services. Includes role-based access control for customers, sellers, and admins, along with secure authentication and full CRUD functionality across the system.
highlights: Full CRUD operations across all entities
